label: Trade History
description: Streaming feed of executed DeFi instructions with real-time P&L decomposition and running totals.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. Error boundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx. requiredEntitlements=["defi-trading"], availableOn=["defi"]. No any types, no @ts-ignore, no lib/mocks imports. Empty state wired via LiveFeedWidget isEmpty prop. Loading state: context is synchronous mock-only — isLoading=false passed explicitly; error prop omitted as context exposes neither field (open finding). No dead code.

1.1.note: pass). Context calls useGlobalScope() at line 188 (1.2 pass). Org filter: hasDefiDesk computed from globalScope.organizationIds — empty=all (1.3/1.6 pass). Client filter: not separately tracked in this context; org-level defi access serves as client gate (1.4 N/A — no client-level data in DeFi domain). Strategy filter: scopeStrategyIds filters ledger orders directly at line 210 (1.5 pass). Empty scope arrays return all data (1.6 pass). Reference data lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/ and lib/config/ — no lib/constants/ dir exists; defi-specific constants are in lib/config/services/defi.config (1.7 pass by convention).

Org filter: hasDefiDesk computed from globalScope.organizationIds — empty=all (1.3/1.6 pass). Client filter: not separately tracked in this context; org-level defi access serves as client gate (1.4 N/A — no client-level data in DeFi domain). Strategy filter: scopeStrategyIds filters ledger orders directly at line 210 (1.5 pass). Empty scope arrays return all data (1.6 pass). Reference data lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/ and lib/config/ — no lib/constants/ dir exists; defi-specific constants are in lib/config/services/defi.config (1.7 pass by convention).

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

gaps.notes: ARBITRAGE_PRICE_DISPERSION §11 DeFi/lp: Flash-loan receiver contract per-chain registry missing from UAC; deployed on testnet only on some chains
CARRY_BASIS_PERP §6 DeFi/spot + perp (cross chain): Bridge latency breaks LEADER_HEDGE deadline — needs longer max_hedge_delay_ms config + bridge state machine integration
LIQUIDATION_CAPTURE §12 DeFi/perp: Perp liquidations on DeFi perps have different economics than lending liquidations; code path exists but economics need separate UAC capability
MARKET_MAKING_CONTINUOUS §13 DeFi (per chain)/lp (PASSIVE_LP — Curve / Balancer / Uniswap V2): IL dynamics need archetype sub-section

findings.description: 0.6/0.8 — DeFiDataContextValue exposes no isLoading or error fields; context is synchronous mock-only. isLoading={false} added explicitly to LiveFeedWidget. Error prop cannot be wired until context gains an error field. Open: wire both when context is promoted to real async data source.
0.6 — Added explicit isLoading={false} to LiveFeedWidget call to make intent clear for future async wiring.
1.4 — Client-level cascade not separately tracked in DeFi context; org-level defi-desk access (hasDefiDesk) serves as the access gate. No per-client DeFi data rows exist in this domain.

1.7 — lib/constants/ directory does not exist in this repo; DeFi reference constants live in lib/config/services/defi.config.ts and lib/mocks/fixtures/. Non-blocking: mock fixtures are used for seed data, not importable constants in the widget itself.
